TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: mkibuhw i Hualien a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu mkibuhw. u kasalumaluma' nu mkibuhw sa, izaw ku 160 a luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, izaw ku 450 a tademaw. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, izaw ku 183 a tademaw, pakalatu 41%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, izaw ku 267 a tademaw, pakalatu 59%. u kasabinacadan, 太魯閣 30%, Amis 6%, Tayal 3%, Puyuma 1%.
S.PHON: mkibuħw i ħuar~ɾiən a kuwan nu kar~ɾinku ku nijazuʔ~ʡ nu mkibuħw. u kasar~ɾumar~ɾumaʔ~ʡ nu mkibuħw sa, izaw ku *** a r~ɾumaʔ~ʡ. kumud nu kasabinawr~ɾan sa, izaw ku *** a tadəmaw. kasabinawr~ɾan nu iŋʦumin sa, izaw ku *** a tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu **%. u zuma sa, ʦaj ku iŋʦumin, izaw ku *** a tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu **%. u kasabinaʦadan, *** **%, amis *%, tajar~ɾ *%, pujuma *%.
S.FORM: mkibuhw i Hualien a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu mkibuhw. u kasalumaluma' nu mkibuhw sa, izaw ku 160 a luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, izaw ku 450 a tademaw. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, izaw ku 183 a tademaw, pakalatu 41%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, izaw ku 267 a tademaw, pakalatu 59%. u kasabinacadan, 太魯閣 30%, Amis 6%, Tayal 3%, Puyuma 1%.
S.PHON: mkibuħw i ħuar~ɾiən a kuwan nu kar~ɾinku ku nijazuʔ~ʡ nu mkibuħw. u kasar~ɾumar~ɾumaʔ~ʡ nu mkibuħw sa, izaw ku *** a r~ɾumaʔ~ʡ. kumud nu kasabinawr~ɾan sa, izaw ku *** a tadəmaw. kasabinawr~ɾan nu iŋʦumin sa, izaw ku *** a tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu **%. u zuma sa, ʦaj ku iŋʦumin, izaw ku *** a tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu **%. u kasabinaʦadan, *** **%, amis *%, tajar~ɾ *%, pujuma *%.
